hero.title: Passer
hero.subtitle: Bridge the gap between your iPhone and PC.
hero.description: Stop emailing yourself files. Passer is the fastest way to sync your clipboard and transfer files across your local network.

instant_sync.title: Instant Sync
instant_sync.description: Copy on PC, paste on iPhone. It's that simple. Works instantly over your local Wi-Fi.

passer_space.title: Passer Space
passer_space.description: Turn your PC into a wireless drive. Access files directly from the iOS Files app.

premium_ux.title: Designed for Windows 11
premium_ux.description: A beautiful, glassmorphic interface that feels right at home on your desktop.

privacy_first.title: Private & Secure
privacy_first.description: No cloud, no accounts, no data leaves your network. Your data stays yours.

shortcuts.title: Powerful iOS Integration
shortcuts.subtitle: Use Apple Shortcuts to trigger actions instantly.

push.title: Push to PC
push.description: Send photos, files, or text from your iPhone share sheet directly to your computer.

pull.title: Pull from PC
pull.description: Grab your PC's clipboard content on your iPhone with a single tap.

pass.title: Quick Pass
pass.description: The fastest way to drop a file or link to your desktop workflow.

footer.author: Designed & Developed by Walson Argan René
